title: alloc_diversifier_and_create_invoice holds BEGIN IMMEDIATE across CPU-bound address derivation
description: alloc_diversifier_and_create_invoice acquires a SQLite BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction (which blocks all other writers) before calling the find_addr closure. find_addr calls dfvk.find_address(start), which is CPU-bound Zcash diversified address derivation (involves Jubjub curve operations). Any SQLite write — including drain, enqueue, register_user — is blocked for the duration of the address computation. The fix is to perform the address derivation before BEGIN IMMEDIATE (read the current diversifier, compute the address, then BEGIN IMMEDIATE + verify/advance + insert). The closure design makes this restructuring non-trivial.
